content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services designed to handle everything your boat needs — from pre-purchase inspections to underwater hull work and everything in between. Whether you're docked in the Chesapeake Bay area or cruising the waters of South Florida, we're here to keep you on the water.

At Ben's Boatworks, our team brings hands-on expertise across four core specialties: Boat Surveying and Inspection, Diving and Underwater Services, Marine AC and Climate Control, and Marine Plumbing and Sanitation. We conduct thorough marine surveys for buyers, sellers, and insurance purposes, and our dive team handles hull cleaning, prop inspections, and underwater repairs without the need to haul out. Our climate control work keeps your cabin comfortable in the Florida heat, and our plumbing and sanitation services ensure your systems stay clean, compliant, and functional.

We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat every vessel with that in mind. Ben's Boatworks serves boat owners across a 60-mile radius throughout South Florida, from weekend cruisers to full-time liveaboards. Our commitment is straightforward — show up, do the work right, and make sure you leave the dock with confidence. If you're in the Annapolis area or anywhere along our South Florida service range, we're ready to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts comprehensive marine surveys covering structural integrity, mechanical systems, and safety equipment to give buyers, sellers, and insurers a clear picture of a vessel's condition. A thorough boat inspection can uncover hidden issues before they become costly problems, protecting your investment and ensuring peace of mind on every voyage.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our dive team performs professional underwater inspections, hull cleaning, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and minor underwater repairs — all without the time and expense of hauling out. Keeping your hull clean and your running gear in good shape directly impacts fuel efficiency, speed, and the long-term health of your vessel.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including chilled water systems and self-contained marine AC units. Proper climate control aboard a vessel isn't just about comfort — it also helps prevent moisture buildup and protects interior finishes and electronics over time.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle the full range of marine plumbing and sanitation work, including through-hull fittings, raw water systems, holding tank installation, and MSD compliance repairs. A properly maintained sanitation system keeps your boat odor-free, legally compliant, and safe for everyone aboard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase marine survey and full condition inspection for prospective buyers
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via professional underwater diving service
Marine air conditioning installation and seasonal AC system tune-up
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system compliance repair
Propeller inspection and underwater running gear check without haul-out
Through-hull fitting inspection and raw water plumbing system overhaul
Insurance or damage survey following a collision or storm event
